chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4244 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 27.08.2025 Mr. Javed Iqbal, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, withdraws the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
